CVE-2023-31606.title: A Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) issue was discover ...
CVE-2023-31606.description: A Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) issue was discovered in the sanitize_html function of redcloth gem v4.0.0. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted payload.
